line_description: A single tall, dark, filled glyph resembling a stylized anthropomorphic figure with a decorative crown/hat at top, slender body with small white circular cutouts, and short legs at the base.

vision_glyph.description: Tall vertical filled black glyph with a curled/crowned top element (resembling a hat or flame), elongated columnar body containing two small white circular voids, and two short leg-like protrusions at the bottom. Organic, irregular silhouette.

graphics.description: Continuous irregular black contour forming a stylized figure; no decorative lines or arcs beyond the silhouette itself.

schmeh_hint: Line 16: latin -> WE SEND YOU OUR WORD AND KNOWLEDGE OVER THIS MESSENGERS
